html:
Exclusive to:

The Cookie Cutter Shell is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is dropped by the Cookie Cutter, which can be found near Salt Formations in the Ocean.

Cookie Cutter Shells are required to craft the Cookie Cutter Cap, and 10 of them are needed to repair the Hermit Home.

They are also required for The Rainy Day Lure, The Snow Day Lure, The Stupefying Lure and The Heavy Weighted Lure.

Trivia

  • Cookie Cutter Shells were introduced in the Salty Dog update.

“A shell of its former self.”
–Wilson
“Ha, I stole its house.”
–Willow
“Tough, but not as tough as Wolfgang!”
–Wolfgang
“All that remains of its former occupant.”
–Wendy
“I HAVE KILLED IT AND TAKEN ITS HOUSE”
–WX-78
“A thick casing of calcium carbonate.”
–Wickerbottom
“He was a tough nut to crack.”
–Woodie
“Hmph. I suppose this could be useful.”
–Maxwell
“Twas a spiky foe.”
–Wigfrid
“Ouch! It's spiky!”
–Webber
“Reminds me a bit of a durian... mostly the smell.”
–Warly
“Spiky home”
–Wormwood
“That thing was well protected.”
–Winona
“The creature fell, now I take its shell!”
–Wortox
“Ha ha! Mine now!”
–Wurt
“These guys have tough armor!”
–Walter
“Mind the spines.”
–Wanda
The Cookie Cutter Shell is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is dropped by the Cookie Cutter, which can be found near Salt Formations in the Ocean.
Cookie Cutter Shells are required to craft the Cookie Cutter Cap, and 10 of them are needed to repair the Hermit Home.
They are also required for The Rainy Day Lure, The Snow Day Lure, The Stupefying Lure and The Heavy Weighted Lure.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Vỏ Cắt Bánh Quy là một Vật Phẩm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Nó rơi ra từ Máy cắt bánh quy, có thể tìm thấy gần các thành tạo muối trên biển.

The '''Cookie Cutter Shell''' is an [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is dropped by the [[Cookie Cutter]], which can be found near [[Salt Formation|Salt Formations]] in the Ocean.

Cookie Cutter Shells are required to craft the [[Cookie Cutter Cap]], and 10 of them are needed to repair the [[Hermit Home]].

They are also required for [[Lures|The Rainy Day Lure]], [[Lures|The Snow Day Lure]], [[Lures|The Stupefying Lure]] and [[Lures|The Heavy Weighted Lure]].
